say -o "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/r2-trans-cli/videos/speech.aiff" "This is a short clip for SnipSnap transcription testing." > "/Users/sdawka/.factory/missions/7ede5099-a0c6-4479-99e9-87a13afef6d2/evidence/core-pipeline/r2-trans-cli/VAL-TRANS-007-generate-speech-audio.txt" 2>&1

SNIPSNAP_DATA_DIR="/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/r2-trans-cli/data" "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.venv/bin/snipsnap" curate --prompt "Find concise highlights" > "/Users/sdawka/.factory/missions/7ede5099-a0c6-4479-99e9-87a13afef6d2/evidence/core-pipeline/r2-trans-cli/curate-run.txt" 2>&1; ec=$?; echo "EXIT_CODE:$ec" >> "/Users/sdawka/.factory/missions/7ede5099-a0c6-4479-99e9-87a13afef6d2/evidence/core-pipeline/r2-trans-cli/curate-run.txt"; exit $ec

SNIPSNAP_DATA_DIR="/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.factory/validation/core-pipeline/user-testing/sandboxes/r2-trans-cli/data" "/Users/sdawka/Code/snipsnap/.venv/bin/snipsnap" export --format edl be19e3be-f25a-4ff0-a3a8-0cd13468a541 > "/Users/sdawka/.factory/missions/7ede5099-a0c6-4479-99e9-87a13afef6d2/evidence/core-pipeline/r2-trans-cli/export-run.txt" 2>&1; ec=$?; echo "EXIT_CODE:$ec" >> "/Users/sdawka/.factory/missions/7ede5099-a0c6-4479-99e9-87a13afef6d2/evidence/core-pipeline/r2-trans-cli/export-run.txt"; exit $ec

assertionResults.title: Transcription JSON Is Valid for Downstream Curation

steps.expected: Transcription JSON files generated without format errors
steps.observed: 2 transcription JSON files generated; command exited 0

steps.action: Run curate with prompt against generated transcriptions
steps.expected: Curate reads transcription JSON and produces cut list
steps.observed: Curate exited 0 and produced cut list be19e3be-f25a-4ff0-a3a8-0cd13468a541

assertionResults.title: Video With No Speech Produces Valid Empty Transcription

steps.action: Create no-speech video fixture and transcribe
steps.expected: Transcription succeeds and produces JSON with empty segments

steps.action: Run curate with no-speech file present in transcription set
steps.expected: Curation handles no-speech transcription gracefully without crashing
steps.observed: Curate command exited 0 and generated a valid cut list

assertionResults.title: Cut List IDs Are Discoverable

steps.expected: Cut list IDs are listed for discovery
steps.observed: Status listed cut list ID be19e3be-f25a-4ff0-a3a8-0cd13468a541

steps.action: Run export with discovered cut list ID
steps.expected: Export succeeds using the discovered ID
steps.observed: Export command accepted the ID but failed with: Export module not available: No module named 'snipsnap.export.edl' (exit 1)

assertionResults.issues: Discovered cut list ID could not be used successfully in export due missing export module (snipsnap.export.edl).

summary: Retested 3 assertions: VAL-TRANS-007 and VAL-TRANS-013 passed. VAL-CLI-004 failed because export with discovered cut list ID exits 1 due missing export module, despite ID discovery working via status output.
